---
title: 'Moon-Wolf Hollow #WhiteNoise'
date: '2023-11-26T04:20:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: false
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6330951126536719716'
blogger_filename: '/2023/11/moon-wolf-hollow-whitenoise_25.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'White Noise'
---

<p style="text-align: left;"><i>A fictitious Wikipedia entry for "Moon-Wolf Hollow, Idaho" (a fictious town) in the White Noise series by D.G. Wolfe</i></p>
<hr />
<h1>Moon-Wolf Hollow, Idaho</h1>
<p><strong>Moon-Wolf Hollow</strong> is a fictional town located in the Idaho Panhandle, United States. Known for its scenic beauty, rich Native American heritage, and mysterious local folklore, the town is a blend of history, nature, and mystery, attracting visitors and researchers alike.</p>
<h2>Contents</h2>
<ol>
<li>History</li>
<li>Geography</li>
<li>Demographics</li>
<li>Culture</li>
<li>Economy</li>
<li>Education</li>
<li>Local Folklore</li>
<li>Notable People</li>
<li>References</li>
</ol>
<h2>History</h2>
<p>Founded in the late 19th century, Moon-Wolf Hollow is said to have been named after the frequent sightings of wolves under the full moon by the original settlers. The town has deep roots in Native American history, with several historical sites dating back to indigenous tribes of the region.</p>
<h2>Geography</h2>
<p>Nestled in a secluded valley surrounded by dense forests and a winding river, the town boasts picturesque landscapes. It experiences a temperate climate, with snowy winters and warm summers, ideal for outdoor activities.</p>
<h2>Demographics</h2>
<p>With a population of approximately 800 residents, Moon-Wolf Hollow is a small, close-knit community. The town has a diverse population with a significant representation of Native American heritage.</p>
<h2>Culture</h2>
<p>The town is known for its annual Moon-Wolf Festival, celebrating its heritage and local folklore. Traditional crafts, music, and storytelling are a significant part of the festival. There are several museums and cultural centers dedicated to preserving the town's history and heritage.</p>
<h2>Economy</h2>
<p>Moon-Wolf Hollow has a mixed economy, with local businesses, tourism, and agriculture being the primary sectors. The town is also known for its artisanal crafts, which are popular among visitors.</p>
<h2>Education</h2>
<p>The town has a public school system serving grades K-12 and is known for its strong emphasis on local history and culture in its curriculum.</p>
<h2>Local Folklore</h2>
<p>Local folklore is rich with tales of spirit animals, mysterious occurrences, and legends of the Moon Wolf, a mythical creature said to protect the town. These stories form an integral part of the town's identity.</p>
<h2>Notable People</h2>
<p>While fictional, notable residents of Moon-Wolf Hollow could include local historians, artists inspired by the town's scenery and lore, and activists working to preserve the natural and cultural heritage.</p>
<h2>References</h2>
<p>This article is about a fictional town and is intended for entertainment or creative purposes only.</p><p><br /></p><p>-------------------------------</p>
<br />
<br />
<br />
<br />
<div id="mc_embed_signup">
<form action="https://darrellwolfe.us3.list-manage.com/subscribe/post?u=979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba&amp;id=14df3ba97b" class="validate" id="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" method="post" name="mc-embedded-subscribe-form" novalidate="" target="_blank">
<div id="mc_embed_signup_scroll">
<label>Subscribe Now - Pursue a No Hiding Lifestyle</label>&nbsp;<input class="email" id="mce-EMAIL" name="EMAIL" required="" type="email" value="" /><br />
<div aria-hidden="true" style="left: -5000px; position: absolute;">
<input name="b_979cb0db6ca74343e82a059ba_14df3ba97b" tabindex="-1" type="text" value="" /></div>
<div class="clear">
<input class="button" id="mc-embedded-subscribe" name="subscribe" type="submit" value="Subscribe" /></div>
</div>
</form>
</div>
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Shalom: Live Long and Prosper!</span><br />
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18pt;">Darrell Wolfe (DG Wolfe)</span></div>
<div class="MsoNormal">
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant @&nbsp;<a href="http://www.darrellwolfe.com/p/start-here-about_12.html" target="_blank">DarrellWolfe.com</a></span><br />
<br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.gallupstrengthscenter.com/" target="_blank">Clifton StrengthsFinder</a>: Intellection, Learner,&nbsp;</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Ideation,</span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">&nbsp;Achiever, Input</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><a href="https://www.16personalities.com/infj-personality" target="_blank">16Personalities</a> (Myers-Briggs Type): INFJ</span><br />
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span>
<span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span></div>
